questions.statement:
Select the number from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.<br />
30, 22, 36, 75, 178, ?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third term in the same way as the first term is related to the second term.</p>

<p>AFK : EJO :: PUZ : ?</p>

<p>In the following question, select the related letters from the given alternatives.</p>

<p>BGMR : DIOT :: SNOV : ?</p>

<p>Which two signs need to be interchanged to make the following equation correct?</p>

<p>25 - 48 + 6&nbsp;&divide;&nbsp;12&nbsp;&times;&nbsp;2 = 41</p>

<p>If &lsquo;J&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;, &lsquo;V&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, &lsquo;K&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;+&rsquo; and &lsquo;A&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&ndash;&rsquo;, what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?</p>

<p>12 J 2 K 17 A 15 V 19 = ?&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>

<p>Identify the missing term from the following options for the given series.</p>

<p>AND, COF, FPI, JQM, _____</p>

options: Neither Conclusion I nor II follows. /
Both Conclusions I and II follow. /
Neither conclusion I nor II follows /
Both conclusions I and II follow /

questions.statement: In a code language, DEN is coded as EDO; BAT is coded as CZU; and BUN is coded as CTO. Then, how would MOP be coded in that language?
